title: poa misera var. strictula
intro: Poa misera var. strictula, also known as poverty grass or mountain bluegrass, is a variety of grass belonging to the genus Poa. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Poa misera var. strictula include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed in small amounts to reap its benefits.
